name: antecedent_trap_mislabeled_subject
description: Acceptance fixture #9. Companion to #1: this time the LLM mistakenly tagged phrase_subject='subject_vendor' on a phrase whose source window proves the negative trait actually belongs to the prior tool. The per-phrase subject gate would *pass* this witness; the source-window antecedent regex must catch it. Exercises competitor-named antecedent pattern 4 ('migrated from [COMPETITOR] to [VENDOR]') and depends on known_vendor_names being plumbed through validate_claim. Without that plumbing the trap is undetectable for patterns 3-6.

review.summary: Switched to Monday from HubSpot for tutoring scheduling
review.review_text: We migrated from HubSpot to Monday.com last year. The previous tool did not provide a good UI for non-sales users and our tutors could not pick it up. Monday has been a clear improvement.

witness.excerpt_text: did not provide a good UI for non-sales users
